content.title: About Velvet (VELVET)
content.description: Velvet is an AI-powered onchain trading and portfolio management terminal designed to integrate spot, perpetuals, and yield strategies into a single vertically integrated system.

content.title: About Bitcoin (BTC)
content.description: Bitcoin is the world's first decentralized cryptocurrency that enables peer-to-peer electronic cash transactions without intermediaries like banks or governments.

content.title: About Siren (SIREN)
content.description: Siren is an AI-powered ecosystem on the BNB Chain that combines meme culture with advanced trading analysis and decentralized finance tools.

content.title: About RE (RE)
content.description: RE is the native governance token for the Re Protocol, a decentralized marketplace designed to connect stablecoin capital with fully collateralized reinsurance contracts.

content.title: About Arcium (ARX)
content.description: Arcium is a parallelized confidential computing network designed to provide a trustless and verifiable framework for executing computations on encrypted data without exposing it to the network.

content.title: PENGU is the official coin of Pudgy Penguins.
content.description: Pudgy Penguins has become the face of crypto with one of the most influential communities in the industry. From large companies wearing the Penguin, to being featured in ETF commercials, to garnering millions of followers and over 100 billion views, the Pengu has become a cultural icon making PENGU the world’s social currency.

content.title: About Stellar
content.description: Stellar is an open-source, decentralized network designed to facilitate the fast and low-cost transfer of value across different currencies and assets globally.

content.title: What is pump.fun?
content.description: Pump.fun is a Solana-based memecoin generator/launchpad that simplifies the process of creating tokens, allowing users to launch their own memecoins without needing technical expertise.

content.title: About Bitway (BTW)
content.description: Bitway is a decentralized strategy infrastructure designed to bridge on-chain liquidity with institutional-grade global financial markets.
